import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for v in sorted
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn flush_token(_ nums: List<Int>, _ cur: String) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    if list.contains(nums, v)
      nums
    else
      insert_sorted(nums, v)
    end
  when None
    nums
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut has = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        nums = flush_token(nums, cur)
        cur = ""
        has = false
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  nums = flush_token(nums, cur)
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in nums
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
